size.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for xs box (24px square, Figma Space/7xl).

icon-size.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for xs icon size (MarsUI Icon/Placeholder_xs 16px — one step above the button xs icon).

radius.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for xs radius (Figma Radius/component/radius_xs 6, same ramp as button).

size.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for sm box (32px square).

icon-size.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for sm icon size (MarsUI Placeholder_sm 18px).

radius.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for sm radius (8, same ramp as button).

size.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for md box (40px square, Figma node 10078:3129).

icon-size.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for md icon size (MarsUI Placeholder_md 20px — the button md icon is 18px, 002 §3).

radius.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for md radius (10, same ramp as button).

size.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for lg box (48px square).

icon-size.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for lg icon size (MarsUI Placeholder_lg 24px).

radius.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for lg radius (12, same ramp as button).

size.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for xl box (56px square).

icon-size.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for xl icon size (MarsUI Placeholder_xl 28px).

radius.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for xl radius (14, same ramp as button).

bg.$description: color used by the icon button component for primary neutral rest background (same semantic reference as the button matrix, 002).

fg.$description: color used by the icon button component for primary neutral rest foreground — the icon inherits it via currentColor.

border.$description: color used by the icon button component for primary neutral rest border (MarsUI bevel top/inline edge).

bg.$description: color used by the icon button component for primary neutral hover background (same semantic reference as the button matrix, 002).

fg.$description: color used by the icon button component for primary neutral hover foreground — the icon inherits it via currentColor.

border.$description: color used by the icon button component for primary neutral hover border (MarsUI bevel top/inline edge).

bg.$description: color used by the icon button component for primary neutral active background (same semantic reference as the button matrix, 002).

fg.$description: color used by the icon button component for primary neutral active foreground — the icon inherits it via currentColor.

border.$description: color used by the icon button component for primary neutral active border (MarsUI bevel top/inline edge).

bg.$description: color used by the icon button component for primary disabled background (tone-independent, like the button disabled cells; deliberate 010 D2 deviation from Figma gray.100 for contrast, pending founder ratification).

fg.$description: color used by the icon button component for primary disabled foreground (tone-independent; 010 D2 deviation from Figma text/base_em, pending founder ratification).

border.$description: color used by the icon button component for primary disabled border (Figma disabled drops the bevel).

shadow.$description: shadow used by the icon button component for primary hover shadow (MarsUI Component_effect/primary_hover).

overlay.$description: color used by the icon button component for the primary hover overlay layer (MarsUI hover_overlay, identical to the button overlay).

border-width.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for border width (MarsUI bevel/outline stroke: 1px, INNER — the square box already contains it).

backdrop-blur.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for the glass variants (primary/secondary) backdrop blur, identical to the button glass. material3 resolves to blur none via the semantic override.

color.$description: color used by the icon button component for focus ring color (the opaque WCAG 1.4.11 indicator).

width.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for focus ring width.

offset.$description: dimension used by the icon button component for focus ring offset.

shadow.$description: shadow used by the icon button component for the focus ring glow (MarsUI Focus/primary: 3px spread ring, V.1 double mechanism).
